ham.subject: Out of Office: Samir Sharma
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from 15th April to 20th April. I will get back to you when I return.

For urgent matters please reach out to Rahul. Thank you.

Regards,
Samir

spam.subject: IT Support Ticket #78910 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

IT Helpdesk has detected a potential security issue with your workstation. Please complete the following steps by 5pm today:

1. Click <URL> to download a verification script.
2. Run the script and send the log file to helpdesk@company.com.
3. Restart your computer.

Failure to comply will result in temporary suspension of network access.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Support Team
